channel.title: close encounters — noteworthy alerts
channel.description: Threshold-rule alerts: sizeable objects inside the lunar distance, very-close approaches, late-warning new objects. Append-only — corrections are emitted as new alerts.

item.title: Alert (short_arc_late_warning): 2026 JA4 — 2026-05-21
item.description: new object with 3-day observation arc; first close approach in 3 days

item.title: Alert (short_arc_late_warning): 2026 JC4 — 2026-05-22
item.description: new object with 9-day observation arc; first close approach in 4 days

item.title: Alert (short_arc_late_warning): 2026 JD4 — 2026-05-21
item.description: new object with 3-day observation arc; first close approach in 2 days

item.title: Alert (short_arc_late_warning): 2026 KC — 2026-05-19
item.description: new object with 4-day observation arc; first close approach in 0 days

item.title: Alert (short_arc_late_warning): 2026 KF — 2026-05-22
item.description: new object with 2-day observation arc; first close approach in 3 days

item.title: Alert (short_arc_late_warning): 2026 KK — 2026-05-23
item.description: new object with 1-day observation arc; first close approach in 4 days
